title: Limited Warranty Deed
warnings: Consideration amount not stated — only 'valuable consideration paid' appears in the document.
Prior instrument reference numbers partially handwritten (2025-8298 and 2025-8299) — read from image; OCR layer unreliable.
Page 10 of 10 not provided in images; full exhibit set may include additional descriptions.

grantors: Kyle C. Brenneman and Sarah N. Brenneman, Co-Trustees of the Kyle C. Brenneman Living Trust dated March 30, 2023, and any amendments thereto
Keaton A. Brenneman and Kristen M. Brenneman, Co-Trustees of the Keaton A. Brenneman Living Trust dated March 2, 2023, and any amendments thereto
grantees: BISTROZZI LLC, a Delaware limited liability company
fields.legal_description: Multiple tracts in the southwest Quarter of Section twelve, Township three South, Range six East, American Township, Allen County, Ohio; addressed at West Bluelick Road and 950 West Bluelick Road, Lima, Ohio 45801. See Exhibits A–E (Tracts A, B, C, E, F, G) prepared by Accu-Trace Land Surveys, Inc., dated March 16–17, 2006, surveyed by George E. Woolley, Ohio Registered Surveyor No. 5772.
fields.note: Deed executed July 11, 2025 (originally typed as June, corrected by hand to July). Prior instrument references: 2025-8298 and 2025-8299, Recorder's Office, Allen County, Ohio. Grantee mailing address: 2801 Centerville Road, 1st Floor, PMB 811, Wilmington, Delaware 19808. Instrument prepared by Jill S. Tangeman, Esq., Vorys, Sater, Seymour and Pease LLP. Consideration stated as "valuable consideration paid" — no specific dollar amount disclosed.

fields.legal_description: Parcel 1 (36-0100-03-002.000): SE Quarter of SW Quarter of Section 1, Township 3 South, Range 6 East, Sugar Creek Township, Allen County, Ohio, excepting 2.92 acres, plus a 3-acre tract in the NE corner of the South Half of the SW Quarter. Parcel 2 (36-1200-02-001.001): 137.490 ac. and 25.000 ac. portions in the NW Quarter of Section 12, Township 3 South, Range 6 East, American Township, Allen County, Ohio (Cole Street / 4110 N. Cole Street, Lima).
fields.note: Transfer date stamped 8/13/2025. Transfer fee $25,572.90; additional fee $1.00. Deed executed July 3, 2025 by William Neff, President of Neff Farms, Inc. Grantee address: 2801 Centerville Road, 1st Floor, PMB 811, Wilmington, DE 19808. Prior instruments: O.R. 2018 Page 2723 (both parcels) and O.R. 2018 Page 7339 (parcel 2 only). Prepared by Jill S. Tangeman, Esq., Vorys, Sater, Seymour and Pease LLP. File Number: GUU24011754.

title: Limited Warranty Deed
warnings: Consideration amount not expressly stated in the deed body ('for valuable consideration paid'); the conveyance fee of $1,041.00 is noted but does not directly state a purchase price.
File number on the deed appears to read 'GUU2401178' but handwritten characters make exact digits uncertain (could be GUU240I178).

fields.legal_description: Situated in the State of Ohio, County of Allen, Township of American, in the southwest quarter of Section 12, Township 3, Range 6, South and East of the First Principal Meridian, being all of the remainder of that tract of land conveyed as Tract 11 to Pike Run Farms LLC by deed of record in Official Record 2024, Page 981; containing 55.881 acres more or less. Property Address: West Bluelick Road, Lima, Ohio 45801.
fields.note: Prior Instrument Reference: OR 2024, Page 981, Recorder's Office, Allen County, Ohio. Deed executed June 11, 2025; recorded August 13, 2025. Grantor signatory: Merle M. Miller, Member. Conveyance fee: $1,041.00; transfer fee: $50.00. File No. GUU240I178 (Fidelity National Title Insurance Company).
